message:
fix(h1,net): add obs-text header value test and avoid intermediate allocations in Happy Eyeballs interleaving

src/http/h1/codec.rs:
- Add decode_obs_text_header_value test verifying that HTTP/1.1 header
  values containing obs-text bytes (0xFF) are accepted per RFC 9110 §5.5

src/net/happy_eyeballs.rs:
- Replace intermediate Vec allocations for v6/v4 address lists with
  lazy iterator filters, avoiding two heap allocations per interleave
  call. The interleaving logic is unchanged — just the collection strategy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
